name: token-torch
description: TOKEN TORCH — a retrospective analytics dashboard for your Claude Code usage (cost, time, and what shipped), from your own ~/.claude/projects logs

scripts.test: tsx scripts/lib/pricing.test.ts && tsx scripts/lib/ingest.test.ts && tsx scripts/lib/types-contract.test.ts && tsx scripts/lib/effort.test.ts && tsx scripts/lib/slice.test.ts && tsx scripts/lib/mapDashboard.slice.test.ts && tsx src/shared/mins.test.ts && tsx src/shared/burnTier.test.ts && tsx scripts/lib/aggregate.test.ts
